2606.05748.title: UNIVID: Unified Vision-Language Model for Video Moderation
2606.05748.paper_summary: Global-scale video moderation faces a dual challenge: the need for fine-grained multi-modal reasoning and the demand for interpretable outputs to support downstream enforcement. Traditional moderation systems often rely on fragmented black-box classifiers that are difficult to maintain and lack transparency. In this paper, we present UNIVID, a UNIfied VIsion-language model for video moDeration. Unlike standard classification models, UNIVID generates policy-aware captions that serve as an interpretable intermediate representation, enabling human-verifiable decisions and multi-task reusability. While existing open-source and commercial VLMs often suffer from safety-guardrail refusals and lack fine-grained policy alignment, we develop a specialized training data recipe that combines expert human-refined labels with synthetic data to align the model with our safety guidelines. By integrating UNIVID as the core captioner, we design a novel end-to-end video moderation system that reduces violation leakage by 42.7% and overkill rate by 37.0% relatively. Meanwhile, by replacing over 1,000 policy-specific models with a single UNIVID backbone, we recycled extensive computation resources while reducing engineering maintenance overhead. To our knowledge, this is one of the first reports of a high-efficiency captioning VLM successfully supporting industrial-scale moderation and cross-functional business.
2606.05748.paper_summary_zh: 全球範圍的視頻審核面臨雙重挑戰：對於細緻的多模態推理的需求以及支持下游執行的可解釋輸出需求。傳統的審核系統通常依賴於難以維護且缺乏透明度的分散黑箱分類器。在本文中，我們提出了UNIVID，一種統一的視覺-語言模型，用於視頻審核。與標準分類模型不同，UNIVID生成政策感知的標題，作為可解釋的中間表示，使得人類可驗證的決策和多任務重用成為可能。雖然現有的開源和商業視覺-語言模型通常會遭遇安全防護拒絕並缺乏細緻的政策對齊，我們開發了一種專門的訓練數據配方，將專家人工精煉的標籤與合成數據結合，以使模型與我們的安全指導方針對齊。通過將UNIVID整合為核心標題生成器，我們設計了一種新穎的端到端視頻審核系統，將違規洩漏降低了42.7%，過度審核率降低了37.0%。同時，通過用單一的UNIVID主幹替換超過1,000個特定政策模型，我們回收了大量計算資源，同時減少了工程維護的開銷。據我們所知，這是首次報告高效標題生成視覺-語言模型成功支持工業規模審核和跨功能業務的案例之一。
2606.05748.author: Kejuan Yang et.al.
2606.05748.authors: Kejuan Yang, Yizhuo Zhang, Mingyuan Du, Yue Zhang, Dixin Zheng, Kaili Zhao, Yang Xiao, Hanzhong Liang, Kenan Xiao
